# zohomail_mailbox_alias (Resource)

Manage a Zoho Mail email alias attached to a mailbox.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "zohomail_mailbox" "support" {
  primary_email_address = "support@example.com"
  initial_password      = var.mailbox_initial_password
  first_name            = "Support"
  last_name             = "Team"
  display_name          = "Support"
  role                  = "member"
  country               = "FR"
  language              = "fr"
  time_zone             = "Europe/Paris"
}

resource "zohomail_mailbox_alias" "sales" {
  mailbox_id  = zohomail_mailbox.support.id
  email_alias = "sales@example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email_alias` (String) Email alias to attach to the mailbox.
- `mailbox_id` (String) Zoho Mail mailbox identifier (`zuid`).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite identifier `<mailbox_id>:<email_alias>`.
